# items

**Instance Property**

The individual items that compose the suggestion’s content.

## Declaration

```swift
let items: [JournalingSuggestion.ItemContent]
```

## Accessing suggestion data by type

- **JournalingSuggestion.ItemContent**: A container for the information about a specific suggestion.
- **content(forType:)**: Searches a suggestion’s items for information of the given type.

items.description: A container for the information about a specific suggestion.
items.name: JournalingSuggestion.ItemContent

items.description: Searches a suggestion’s items for information of the given type.
items.name: content(forType:)
